sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76320" key="o)yi/karpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψῐ´καρπ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n76320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fruiting late</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:6:4:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.4.6</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
